positive: A minimalist, celestial-themed illustration featuring a majestic, stylized mountain range silhouette at dusk. The peaks should be outlined in deep indigo and charcoal gray, contrasted sharply against a vibrant gradient sky of teal, coral, and luminous gold. Include scattered, abstract representations of constellations (like simple geometric line work) and several stylized, bioluminescent hot air balloons floating among the peaks. The composition should be centered, highly detailed yet clean, with a focus on strong color blocking and high contrast. Style: Neo-geometric, Art Deco inspired graphic design, perfect for screen printing on t-shirts. Composition: Balanced, symmetrical, ideal for central placement. Lighting: Dramatic twilight glow. Aspect: Square format.
negative: blur, noise, grain, text, watermark, signature, cropped, low resolution, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealistic, 3d render, fuzzy, messy, realistic photograph
